prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Audit FastAPI's security dependency flow for bearer-token-protected routes. Find the Python source files in fastapi/fastapi that (1) define OAuth2 bearer helpers and security scopes, (2) resolve security dependencies for a request, and (3) raise the authentication or authorization errors returned when token validation fails.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the fastapi-web-framework fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Audit FastAPI's security dependency flow for bearer-token-protected routes. Find the Python source files in fastapi/fastapi that (1) define OAuth2 bearer helpers and security scopes, (2) resolve security dependencies for a request, and (3) raise the authentication or authorization errors returned when token validation fails.

params.search_pattern: OAuth2 OR JWT OR security scopes OR bearer
